dublinCore.dc:title: 115 HRES 95 EH: Electing Members to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Electing Members to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives.

section.text: That the following named Members be, and are hereby, elected to the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Jackson Lee and Ms. Schakowsky.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Oversight and Government Reform:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Welch, Mr. Cartwright, and Mr. DeSaulnier.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Science, Space, and Technology:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. McNerney, Mr. Perlmutter, Mr. Tonko, Mr. Foster, Mr. Takano, Ms. Hanabusa, and Mr. Crist.
Ms. Clarke of New York, Ms. Judy Chu of California, Ms. Adams, and Mr. Espaillat.
Mr. Sablan, Ms. Esty, and Mr. Peters.
